title: Savory Light Korean Apple Stir-fry
description: A light and savory meal-prep dish featuring a keto-friendly mix of applesauce with other vegetables and seasonings, simmered to perfection.
instructions: Peel, dice the apple into small cubes. Finely chop the onion and carrot.
Heat a bit of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add diced onions and garlic; sauté for about 2 minutes until they start to get translucent.
Add finely chopped carrot and bell pepper. Stir-fry for another 3-4 minutes, seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
Next, add grated ginger into the pan and stir for an additional minute.
Now, mix in diced apple cubes. Cook for about 2 more minutes until the apples are slightly softened.
Serve hot as a side dish or meal-prepped ahead of time.
Note: Adjust cooking time based on preference and don't overcook to keep it light and fresh.
